name: The Sanctified Darklord
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>属</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ぞく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>堕</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>天</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>使</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Send 1 "Darklord" monster from your hand or face-up from your field to the GY; negate the effects of 1 Effect Monster on the field until the end of this turn, and if you do, gain LP equal to its ATK. You can only activate 1 "The Sanctified Darklord" per turn.
eff: Send 1 "Darklord" monster from your hand or face-up from your field to the GY; negate the effects of 1 Effect Monster on the field until the end of this turn, and if you do, gain LP equal to its ATK. You can only activate 1 "The Sanctified Darklord" per turn.

action: Sends from hand to Graveyard for cost
Sends from field to Graveyard for cost
mst: Negates the effects of Effect Monsters
